reviews.comment:
Llegamos a la tarde y no tenia nada para comer.
Baños sucios y desprolijos

(Translated by Google)
We arrived in the afternoon and there was nothing to eat.
The bathrooms were dirty and messy.

reviews.comment:
Exelente lugar para descanso de una noche ,tenés todo lo que necesitas , buen wifi, limpieza y servicio de lo mejor

(Translated by Google)
Excellent place for a one-night stay, you have everything you need, good Wi-Fi, cleanliness, and the best service.

reviews.comment:
El personal muy atento,aprovecho a agradecerles a todos por su comportamiento para con nosotros el día 21/1/2022 cuando mi marido se descompenzo mientra esperábamos cargar combustible

(Translated by Google)
The staff were very attentive. I would like to take this opportunity to thank everyone for their behavior towards us on 21/1/2022 when my husband became ill while we were waiting to refuel.
